core_objective.text: BUILD A VAULT-EQUITY LINEAR REGRESSION TRADING RESEARCH PIPELINE: ingest OHLCV using the FMP/PostgreSQL contract from vault_equity (1).ipynb (stable API, equity_bars, 5min), engineer lagged features with strict anti-leakage (shift targets, walk-forward folds, no future data in train), fit sklearn LinearRegression for next-bar direction, backtest out-of-sample only, and emit verified PNL JSON+MD reports. Research only — no live trading.

master_plan.title: Vault-equity data loader (FMP + DB + CSV fallback)
master_plan.intent: Create data_loader.py mirroring vault_equity (1).ipynb: FMP stable base URL, equity_bars schema, 5min bars. Expose load_bars(symbol='AAPL', interval='5min') -> DataFrame[ts_utc, open, high, low, close, volume]. Try PostgreSQL equity_bars first; on failure load sample_data/aapl_5min_sample.csv. Document vault_equity column contract in module docstring.

master_plan.title: Leakage-safe linear regression signal model
master_plan.intent: Create signal_model.py: build features from PAST bars only (returns, rolling vol, RSI) with pandas shift so labels use future returns never in X. Walk-forward train: expanding window, min_train_bars=500, retrain every 100 bars. sklearn LinearRegression predicts next-bar return; threshold to signal {-1,0,1}. Expose train_walk_forward(df) and predict_oos(df). Include assert_no_leakage(df) that fails if any feature column correlates perfectly with unshifted future return.

master_plan.title: OOS backtest, PNL write-up, pytest verification
master_plan.intent: Create backtest_pnl.py: run ONLY out-of-sample predictions from signal_model walk-forward folds. Compute cumulative PNL, max drawdown, hit rate, Sharpe. Write reports/pnl_report.json and reports/pnl_report.md with methodology section on leakage controls. Add tests/test_backtest_pnl.py with pytest asserting finite metrics and non-empty trade log.
